input.name: Git Push Review Guide
input.overview: Deep review of ~62 modified + 17 untracked files (~2,200 lines). Recommend one integration PR for the feature work, with explicit exclusions for artifacts and two blocking fixes before push.
input.plan:
# Git push review guide

## Snapshot

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Modified (tracked) | 62 files (+2,208 / −254 lines) |
| Untracked (new) | 17 files + `dist/` folder |
| Test status (`.venv`) | **234 passed, 2 failed** — not push-ready until fixed |
| Your preference | **One integration PR** |

This is not one random pile of edits. It is **one product release** with four intertwined themes:

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  subgraph core [Core theme: stored job descriptions]
    Schema["catalog/schema + repo\nmatching_jobs.description_text"]
    Scrape["scrape/descriptions.py\nscrape/job_text.py\nboards/* detail fetchers"]
    Enrich["scrape/enrich.py + merge.py"]
    Backfill["scripts/fix_job_descriptions.py"]
  end
  subgraph mcp [MCP application workspace]
    MCP["mcp/service.py + server.py\nget_job_context, fetch-description API"]
    UI["static/company.* + styles.css"]
    Docs["docs/reference/mcp-application.md"]
  end
  subgraph countries [Custom countries]
    Tags["core/location_tags.py + paths.py"]
    API["web/routes/catalog.py\nPOST /api/countries"]
    Dialog["static/js/dialogs.js + index.html"]
  end
  subgraph board [Board UX fixes]
    Pin["positions/repo.py\nmulti-pin per company"]
    React["frontend/CompanyCard.jsx\n+ static/dist/board.js"]
    Expired["expired hide reason\nconstants.js, render.js"]
  end
  Scrape --> Schema
  Schema --> MCP
  Tags --> API
  Tags --> MCP
```

Per [engineering-standards](.claude/skills/engineering-standards/SKILL.md): push should increase stability, include tests for real behavior, and delete dead code — not ship WIP artifacts.

---

## Do NOT push (exclude from git)

| Path | Reason |
|------|--------|
| [`.DS_Store`](.DS_Store), [`dist/.DS_Store`](dist/.DS_Store) | macOS junk — add `**/.DS_Store` to [`.gitignore`](.gitignore) |
| [`dist/`](dist/) entire folder | Distribution bundle for Claude Desktop MCP skill — duplicates gitignored [`.claude/skills/`](.claude/skills/) content. Contains accidental duplicate `mcp-resume-reframe-for-claude 2/`. Only the zip is partially ignored today |
| [`dist/mcp-resume-reframe-for-claude.zip`](dist/mcp-resume-reframe-for-claude.zip) | Already in `.gitignore`; keep out |

**Recommendation:** Extend `.gitignore` with:
```
**/.DS_Store
/dist/
```
(Keep source of truth in `.claude/skills/mcp-resume-reframe/` locally; docs already link there.)

---

## Fix BEFORE push (blocking)

### 1. Missing import — CI will fail

[`relocation_jobs/mcp/service.py`](relocation_jobs/mcp/service.py) line 801 calls `set_job_applied` but the import was dropped during refactor:

```python
# Restore:
from relocation_jobs.positions.service import set_job_applied
```

Confirmed failure: `tests/mcp/test_mcp_service.py::test_mark_job_applied`.

### 2. ATS resolve reorder broke a test

[`relocation_jobs/scrape/ats_resolve.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/ats_resolve.py) now runs `apply_known_ats_override()` **before** the `generic` early-return. That is correct for Wolt/GetYourGuide/Mobile.de overrides, but it causes `careers.example.com` to match `_detect_recruitee_from_careers_host` → `example.recruitee.com`.

Failure: `tests/scrape/test_generic_board.py::test_fetch_ats_board_dispatches_generic`.

**Fix (pick one):**
- **A (test-only):** Change test URL to something that does not match `careers.{slug}.com` (e.g. `https://jobs.acme.example.org/`)
- **B (logic):** In `apply_known_ats_override`, run KNOWN_ATS / FORCE / branded-host overrides first, then **return without career-host detectors** when `cached == "generic"` and company is not in KNOWN_ATS

Option B preserves explicit `generic` intent; option A is minimal.

### 3. Duplicate function — accidental paste

[`relocation_jobs/catalog/repo.py`](relocation_jobs/catalog/repo.py) defines `_company_row` twice (lines ~97 and ~446). Remove the second copy.

### 4. Stage all untracked feature files

These are part of the release but currently **not in git**:

**Must stage:**
- [`relocation_jobs/scrape/boards/hibob.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/boards/hibob.py) — HiBob board scraper (referenced from [`board.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/board.py))
- [`scripts/fix_job_descriptions.py`](scripts/fix_job_descriptions.py), [`scripts/refetch_smartrecruiters_descriptions.py`](scripts/refetch_smartrecruiters_descriptions.py) — backfill tooling paired with scrape layer
- All 13 untracked test files under `tests/scrape/`, `tests/core/`, `tests/mcp/`
- [`tests/fixtures/ats/hibob_job_ads.json`](tests/fixtures/ats/hibob_job_ads.json), [`smartrecruiters_posting_detail.json`](tests/fixtures/ats/smartrecruiters_posting_detail.json)

---

## Push in one integration PR (recommended)

**Suggested title:** `MCP application workspace: API-backed job descriptions, HiBob ATS, custom countries, board UX`

**Suggested commit scope — include everything below:**

### Layer 1: Scrape + descriptions (largest coherent unit)

| Files | What it does |
|-------|--------------|
| [`scrape/descriptions.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/descriptions.py) | HTML→readable, sanitization, noisy-page recovery, refetch heuristics |
| [`scrape/job_text.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/job_text.py) | Central `fetch_job_detail` dispatcher; SmartRecruiters/Greenhouse/Ashby/Recruitee/Lever/HiBob |
| [`scrape/boards/hibob.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/boards/hibob.py) + ashby/greenhouse/smartrecruiters diffs | Board + detail helpers |
| [`scrape/enrich.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/enrich.py), [`merge.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/merge.py), [`filter.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/filter.py) | Enrichment stores `description_text`; merge preserves it |
| [`core/ats_constants.py`](relocation_jobs/core/ats_constants.py), [`ats_detection.py`](relocation_jobs/core/ats_detection.py), [`scrape/ats_resolve.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/ats_resolve.py) | HiBob detection; Wolt→Greenhouse, GetYourGuide, Mobile.de→HiBob; override ordering |
| [`scrape/board.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/board.py) | Registers HiBob fetcher |
| Scripts + scrape tests + fixtures | Backfill + coverage |

**Known follow-up (not blocking):** `apply_fetched_location` in [`merge.py`](relocation_jobs/scrape/merge.py) is defined but never called — location from detail APIs is modeled in `JobFetchResult` but not wired into enrich yet.

### Layer 2: Catalog + MCP + panel JD workflow

| Files | What it does |
|-------|--------------|
| [`catalog/schema.py`](relocation_jobs/catalog/schema.py), [`repo.py`](relocation_jobs/catalog/repo.py), [`writes.py`](relocation_jobs/catalog/writes.py), [`stats.py`](relocation_jobs/catalog/stats.py) | `description_text` column + `update_job_description_text` |
| [`mcp/service.py`](relocation_jobs/mcp/service.py), [`server.py`](relocation_jobs/mcp/server.py), [`types.py`](relocation_jobs/mcp/types.py) | `get_job_context` with JD; `list_supported_countries`, `list_ats_types`, `add_company`; panel fetch |
| [`web/routes/mcp.py`](relocation_jobs/web/routes/mcp.py) | `GET/POST …/positions/<key>/description`, `fetch-description` |
| [`static/company.html`](relocation_jobs/static/company.html), [`js/company.js`](relocation_jobs/static/js/company.js), [`styles.css`](relocation_jobs/static/styles.css) | JD toggle, view panel, fetch button |
| [`docs/reference/mcp-application.md`](docs/reference/mcp-application.md) | Documents stored JD workflow |

**Note:** `POST …/fetch-description` returns **503** when `PANEL_SCRAPE_ENABLED` is off or `httpx` missing — correct for Render v1 prod; document in PR body.

### Layer 3: Custom countries (coupled to MCP + validators)

| Files | What it does |
|-------|--------------|
| [`core/location_tags.py`](relocation_jobs/core/location_tags.py), [`core/paths.py`](relocation_jobs/core/paths.py) | `add_custom_country`, `supported_countries()`, `all_country_labels()` |
| [`web/routes/catalog.py`](relocation_jobs/web/routes/catalog.py), [`validators.py`](relocation_jobs/web/validators.py), [`companies.py`](relocation_jobs/web/routes/companies.py), [`fetch.py`](relocation_jobs/web/routes/fetch.py) | Dynamic country list |
| [`static/js/dialogs.js`](relocation_jobs/static/js/dialogs.js), [`api.js`](relocation_jobs/static/js/api.js), [`index.html`](relocation_jobs/static/index.html) | Add-country UI in add-company dialog |
| [`admin/service.py`](relocation_jobs/admin/service.py), [`panel/service.py`](relocation_jobs/panel/service.py) | Admin config exposes custom countries |
| [`tests/core/test_custom_countries.py`](tests/core/test_custom_countries.py), [`tests/web/test_catalog_api.py`](tests/web/test_catalog_api.py) | Coverage |

### Layer 4: Board UX (smaller, safe to bundle)

| Files | What it does |
|-------|--------------|
| [`positions/repo.py`](relocation_jobs/positions/repo.py) | **Multi-pin:** no longer clears sibling pins in same company |
| [`static/js/job-board.js`](relocation_jobs/static/js/job-board.js), [`render.js`](relocation_jobs/static/js/render.js) | Client pin behavior; pinned jobs sorted by `pinned_at` |
| [`frontend/src/CompanyCard.jsx`](frontend/src/CompanyCard.jsx), [`constants.js`](frontend/src/constants.js) | City truncation (+N); **expired** hide reason |
| [`static/dist/board.js`](relocation_jobs/static/dist/board.js) | Rebuilt React bundle — **must ship with** `CompanyCard.jsx` changes |
| [`tests/web/test_job_pin.py`](tests/web/test_job_pin.py) | Updated pin contract |

**Behavior change to note in PR:** multi-pin replaces previous single-pin-per-company. [`docs/reference/business-rules.md`](docs/reference/business-rules.md) already documents `expired` hide reason (small doc touch in diff is fine).

### Layer 5: Docs (include with PR)

| File | Include? |
|------|----------|
| [`docs/reference/mcp-application.md`](docs/reference/mcp-application.md) | **Yes** — documents shipped MCP JD workflow |
| [`docs/backlog.md`](docs/backlog.md) | **Yes** — expired hide + board read-model backlog entries |
| [`docs/README.md`](docs/README.md), [`board.md`](docs/reference/board.md), [`catalog-pattern.md`](docs/reference/catalog-pattern.md), [`business-rules.md`](docs/reference/business-rules.md) | **Yes** — cross-links |
| [`docs/reference/board-read-model-proposal.md`](docs/reference/board-read-model-proposal.md) | **Yes, but only because** [`docs/README.md`](docs/README.md) already links to it — otherwise keep local until approved. Status is explicitly "proposal (not approved)" |
| [`README.md`](README.md) | **Yes** — minor update |

### Minor / supporting (include)

- [`relocation_jobs/companies/service.py`](relocation_jobs/companies/service.py) — uses dynamic countries
- [`relocation_jobs/web/query.py`](relocation_jobs/web/query.py) — small cleanup (−2 lines)
- [`scripts/exclude_stray_board_jobs.py`](scripts/exclude_stray_board_jobs.py) — uses `supported_countries()`
- [`tests/conftest.py`](tests/conftest.py), [`tests/helpers/route_manifest.py`](tests/helpers/route_manifest.py) — test infra updates

---

## Pre-push checklist

1. Apply the 3 code fixes above (import, duplicate `_company_row`, ATS resolve/test)
2. Stage all untracked feature files listed in "Fix BEFORE push"
3. Rebuild frontend if you edit React after staging: `cd frontend && npm run build`
4. Run CI-equivalent tests:
   ```bash
   .venv/bin/pytest tests -o addopts= -q
   ```
   Target: **0 failures** (currently 2)
5. Optionally run coverage gate: `./scripts/run_ci_tests.sh`
6. Verify `.gitignore` excludes `dist/` and `.DS_Store`
7. Review staged diff one last time: `git diff --cached --stat`

---

## Optional polish (same PR or fast follow-up)

| Item | Severity |
|------|----------|
| Wire `apply_fetched_location` into enrich (location from detail APIs) | Medium — dead code today |
| Update MCP `list_supported_countries` docstring (still says 4 fixed countries) | Low |
| Duplicate `description_text` migration in schema (`catalog_job_description_v1` + `_ensure_job_columns`) | Low — harmless `IF NOT EXISTS` |
| Add `**/.DS_Store` and `/dist/` to `.gitignore` | Recommended |

---

## What this PR delivers (for PR description)

- **Stored job descriptions** in Postgres with API-backed fetch from SmartRecruiters, Greenhouse, Ashby, Recruitee, Lever, HiBob
- **HiBob ATS** board scraping + Mobile.de company override
- **Company ATS fixes** for Wolt (Greenhouse) and GetYourGuide (branded careers)
- **MCP workspace:** JD in `get_job_context`, panel fetch button, `add_company` / `list_ats_types` / `list_supported_countries` tools
- **Custom countries** via panel + catalog API
- **Board UX:** multi-pin per company, expired hide reason, improved location display
- **Backfill scripts** for fixing noisy SmartRecruiters page scrapes in existing data

---

## Summary verdict

| Category | Verdict |
|----------|---------|
| **Push (one PR)** | All 62 modified files + 17 untracked feature files above |
| **Exclude** | `dist/`, `.DS_Store`, zip artifacts |
| **Fix first** | `set_job_applied` import, ATS resolve test regression, duplicate `_company_row` |
| **Tests** | 234/236 pass today — must be green before push |
| **Cohesion** | Strong — one integration PR is the right shape for your preference |

todos.content: Fix ATS resolve generic regression (test URL or logic guard)
Stage hibob.py, scripts, tests, fixtures, board-read-model-proposal.md
Run full pytest suite — confirm 0 failures before commit
Create single integration commit/PR with recommended scope

content.text:
<timestamp>Tuesday, Jul 7, 2026, 3:19 AM (UTC+4)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Git push review guide

Implement the plan as specified, it is attached for your reference. Do NOT edit the plan file itself.

To-do's from the plan have already been created. Do not create them again. Mark them as in_progress as you work, starting with the first one. Don't stop until you have completed all the to-dos.
</user_query>

Implementing the plan: starting with the blocking fixes, then staging, tests, and the integration commit.

[REDACTED]
